parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title start EventLoop

participant "server.activeListener.OnAccept" as A
participant "server.newActiveRawConn" as B
participant "server.ContinueFilterChain" as C
participant "server.activeListener.newConnection" as D
participant "sever.activeListener.OnNewConnection" as E
participant "sever.newActiveConnection" as F
participant "network.connection.Start" as G
participant "network.startRWLoop" as H
participant "network.attachEventLoop" as I

A -> B : 
A -> C : 创建 filter chain
C -> D : 创建 connection
D -> E : 调用 activeListener 的处理新连接事件接口
E -> F : 处理新连接事件
E -> G : 连接启动
G -> H : 处理读写时间
G -> I : 保存 EventLoop

@enduml
```
